title: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: Tanker hit by ‘large explosion’ off Kuwait, causing oil spill; Iran launches missiles at Israel
content:
The ongoing US-Israel-Iran conflict is experiencing live developments and escalation.
*   A tanker off Kuwait was hit by a large explosion, leading to an oil spill.
*   Iran has launched missiles targeting Israel.

title: BJP claims ₹39,000 crore of SCSP-TSP funds diverted for guarantee schemes by Congress government in Karnataka
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The BJP claims the Congress government in Karnataka diverted ₹39,000 crore.
*   These funds were originally allocated under the SCSP-TSP (Scheduled Caste Sub-Plan and Tribal Sub-Plan) for SC/ST welfare.
*   The diverted money was allegedly used to fund the state's guarantee schemes.

title: Four TMC, one BJP candidate file nominations for Rajya Sabha elections in West Bengal
content:
Four candidates from the Trinamool Congress (TMC) have filed their nominations.
*   One candidate from the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has also filed a nomination.
*   All these nominations are for the upcoming Rajya Sabha elections in West Bengal.

title: The promise of a bridge to development in Odisha’s Kalahandi
content:
A new bridge has been promised for the Kalahandi region in Odisha.
*   The bridge's primary goal is to foster development in the area.
*   This initiative represents a future step towards improving connectivity and progress for the region.

title: Karnataka govt. revises orderly system for senior police officers
content:
The Karnataka government is making changes to its existing orderly system.
*   This system specifically pertains to how junior police personnel are assigned to senior police officers.
*   The revision indicates an update or modification of current practices regarding these assignments.

title: Work begins on outer ring road project in Vellore
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Work has officially begun on the project.
*   The project involves the construction of an outer ring road.
*   Its location is in Vellore.

title: Rajya Sabha election: Congress fields new face Christopher in Tamil Nadu
content:
The **Congress** party has nominated **Christopher** for the **Rajya Sabha election**.
*   Christopher is described as a **"new face"** in the political arena.
*   This nomination is taking place in **Tamil Nadu**.

title: Stalin launches new programmes; inaugurates various projects
content:
Stalin is launching new programmes.
*   He is inaugurating various projects.
*   The headline highlights his active involvement in new state initiatives.

title: Migrant worker held for assaulting TTE at Jolarpet railway station
content:
A migrant worker assaulted a TTE (Travelling Ticket Examiner).
*   The incident took place at Jolarpet railway station.
*   The worker has been apprehended for the assault.

title: One for all: On seat-sharing for the Tamil Nadu Assembly election
content:
The headline refers to **seat-sharing discussions** among political parties for the upcoming Tamil Nadu Assembly election.
*   "One for all" implies a **united approach or consensus** within alliances regarding the distribution of constituencies.
*   The goal is to **strategically allocate seats** among alliance partners to maximize their collective chances of electoral success.
